source_query: Phoenix AZ roofing public business listing; BBB business profile; Arizona Roofing Contractors Association profile
source_evidence: BBB profile lists Hardacker Roofing LLC, business started 2005-04-27, incorporated 2005-05-16, LLC entity, Clyde Howard Hardacker as President/CEO and principal/customer contact, Bonnie Hardacker as bookkeeper, and roofing contractor categories. Arizona Roofing Contractors Association profile lists Hardacker Roofing LLC at 2450 East Bell Road Phoenix AZ 85032, phone 602-358-8458, Roofing Contractor Member, residential and commercial contractor type. Procore/SAFER public profiles also corroborate roofing trade, Phoenix address, phone, and legal name.
visible_gap: Website was not readable during collector sweep and no clean first-party contact form was detected; public authority exists but the conversion path should be made clearer.
offer_angle: Roofing authority and contact-path audit: make the website crawlable, expose a clean estimate path, and align BBB/association trust proof with conversion flow.
public_research_note: Promoted after BBB and Arizona Roofing Contractors Association evidence verified business identity, trade, phone/address, and Clyde Howard Hardacker as President/CEO/principal contact. Website/contact path remains an offer gap, not a rejection reason.
